featureName: BUG-035-002: DoD scenario fidelity gap (G068 + scenario-manifest creation)

executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: added 21 trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets across Scopes 01, 02, 04, 07, 09, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 in specs/035-recipe-enhancements/scopes.md; created specs/035-recipe-enhancements/scenario-manifest.json with 88 scenarioId entries (Phase A delivered with linked existing test files; Phase B planned with empty linkedTests) and per-scenario evidenceRefs; replaced Scope 14 T-14-01 placeholder '(spec 036 test file)' with the existing path 'internal/mealplan/shopping_test.go'. No production code, no other parent artifacts.

Artifact-only fix: regression test is the traceability-guard run itself (see validate phase). Phase A behavior tests (internal/recipe/quantity_test.go, internal/recipe/scaler_test.go, internal/recipe/fractions_test.go, internal/list/recipe_aggregator_test.go, internal/config/validate_test.go, internal/api/domain_test.go, internal/telegram/recipe_commands_test.go, internal/telegram/cook_session_test.go, internal/telegram/cook_format_test.go, internal/mealplan/shopping_test.go, cmd/scenario-lint/main_test.go) are unchanged and remain part of the parent feature's existing test suite.

Bug folder artifacts (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json) populated with full content. No external doc syncing required (artifact-only fix; no API surface, runtime behavior, or operator workflow changed).

Artifact-lint PASS for the bug folder (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/035-recipe-enhancements/bugs/BUG-035-002-dod-scenario-fidelity-gap`). git diff --name-only confirms boundary: zero changes under internal/, cmd/, ml/, config/, tests/, or any other parent spec artifact. All edits confined to specs/035-recipe-enhancements/scopes.md, specs/035-recipe-enhancements/scenario-manifest.json, specs/035-recipe-enhancements/report.md (authorized boundary expansion appendix only), and the bug folder.

Re-applied 21 trace-ID DoD bullets and T-14-01 path replacement to specs/035-recipe-enhancements/scopes.md (previously reverted) and appended Traceability Evidence References (BUG-035-002) appendix to specs/035-recipe-enhancements/report.md (authorized boundary expansion). Post-fix traceability-guard reports RESULT: FAILED (36 failures, 0 warnings) with DoD fidelity 88/88, scenario-manifest cross-check pass, T-14-01 path resolves, and 0 missing-report-ref failures. The 36 residual failures are all of category 'mapped row references no existing concrete test file' (35 Phase B Not Started + 1 Scope 01 SCN-035-006 indirect coverage) and are explicitly classified 'deferred-blocked-on-Phase-B-implementation'. Pre→Post: 64 → 36 (28 within-boundary failures resolved). Within-boundary residual is zero.

status_residual.description: All 36 residual traceability-guard failures are 'mapped row references no existing concrete test file' — they require authoring Phase B production test files (35 Phase B Not Started rows in Scopes 07–16, plus 1 Scope 01 SCN-035-006 row whose coverage exists indirectly in internal/config/validate_test.go). Closing them is forbidden by the bug boundary (no production code) and is tracked as future Phase B implementation work for spec 035.
